name: 江南宅院
description: 精致江南园林宅院，客房被枕与宴席桌椅布置在内院，昭昭满月礼与玩具散落。院门雪堆可见，院落有雪球痕迹，连接内外空间，兼具私宅温馨与园林雅致。
visual_reference: Elegant Jiangnan garden residence in late Ming dynasty style, inner guest rooms with pillows and banquet tables, baby full-month gifts and toys scattered, courtyard gate with snow piles, snowball marks, mixed interior-exterior layout with white walls dark tiles and garden elements, daytime and nighttime variations, highly detailed cinematic
lighting: 白天明亮园林光线，夜间烛火温暖幽暗
emotional_range: 陆姝仪道歉重逢的尴尬到三年后沈词凄凉乞求与贪婪贴背
